title: ipomoea involucrata var. operosa
intro: Ipomoea involucrata var. operosa, also known as Morning Glory, is a species of flowering plant in the Convolvulaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ipomoea involucrata var. operosa include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antispasmodic to relieve muscle cramps and spasms. Herbal preparations of Ipomoea involucrata var. operosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the leaves and flowers of the plant and steeping them in hot water.
